_comment: DEMO/TEST feed: version label is bumped so an installed 26.1.0-rc.1 sees an update and can exercise Download & Install. The macOS asset is the REAL notarized 26.1.0-rc.1 DMG (sha256 matches). Set version to the true build once a real newer RC is published, or revert to 26.1.0-rc.1 to show 'up to date'.
